description_long: This is a tan, mid-calf winter boot with a rounded toe and a flat, slightly textured sole. The exterior is made of soft suede material, while the interior is lined with plush, white shearling for insulation and comfort. The boot features a simple, slip-on design with no visible laces or fasteners, and subtle stitching details run horizontally and vertically along the shaft and foot. The heel is low and flat, providing stability for walking on urban surfaces. A small rectangular fabric label with the 'UGG' logo is sewn onto the back of the heel. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A tan suede mid-calf winter boot with a plush white shearling lining, flat sole, and a visible 'UGG' logo on the heel. The boot is clean, slip-on, and features subtle stitching details.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the rounded toe, smooth suede upper, and plush white lining at the top opening.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the back seam, the 'UGG' logo label on the heel, and the flat sole.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the heel, logo label, and the interior shearling lining.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the toe box, side stitching, and the soft suede texture.
attribute_logo: Rectangular fabric label with 'UGG' text, located on the back of the heel, gray text on a white background.
